name: pallets/flask
rationale: Clean, well-architected micro-framework. Extension pattern, clear separation.

name: tiangolo/fastapi
rationale: Modern async framework, clean dependency injection, well-structured.

name: encode/httpx
rationale: Clean async HTTP client, well-layered transport/client separation.

name: pydantic/pydantic
rationale: Data validation library, clean type-driven architecture.

name: sqlalchemy/sqlalchemy
rationale: Massive but well-structured ORM. Core/ORM layer separation.

name: mitmproxy/mitmproxy
rationale: Well-structured proxy tool with clean addon system.

name: cookiecutter/cookiecutter
rationale: Template engine, relatively flat but clean API.

name: saltstack/salt
rationale: Massive legacy codebase, organic growth, god modules.

name: scrapy/scrapy
rationale: Well-designed crawling framework with clean middleware/pipeline pattern.

name: sanic-org/sanic
rationale: Async web framework, mixed reputation on code quality.

name: OctoPrint/OctoPrint
rationale: 3D printer controller, organic monolith growth, likely god modules.

name: openstack/nova
rationale: Massive legacy compute service, complex coupling.

name: matplotlib/matplotlib
rationale: Large legacy plotting library, complex god classes, organic growth.
